name: v05-github-handler-issues
description: Per-event GitHub webhook sub-workflow: handles the issue family (issues, issue_comment). Same grouping pattern as the pull-request handler.

inputs.expression: ({ handler: 'issues-family', action: ctx.request.body.action || null, issueNumber: (ctx.request.body.issue && ctx.request.body.issue.number) || null, eventType: ctx.request.body._eventType || null })
